subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! I am Thy servant, destitute and despairing of mine own self, overwhelmed by my manifold transgressions and grievous sins [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی انی عبدک البائس الیائس عن نفسی و فرط خطائی و عظیم حوبی و شدید
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayers (general or uncategorized)
